title: A Berkeley AI professor makes provocative argument for decelerating AI research
abstract: Isn't it mind-boggling how fast AI is advancing, leaving some of us lagging behind? Hold on, a Berkeley AI professor has an intriguing argument for slowing down research. This doesn't mean stopping AI altogether but calls for considering ethical and social implications as we advance. Join the discussion—this might be more exciting than your average binge-watching session!
abstract_zh: 这可真是个让人挠头的问题：你是不是也觉得AI发展太快，有点跟不上？别急，有个Berkeley的AI教授说，咱们得慢点研究！这不是在说要停下来不搞AI，而是在提醒我们，技术的发展也需要考虑伦理和社会影响。快来听听这位大佬怎么说吧！这可比看肥宅快乐水还过瘾！
